item.title: Gearbox Issues in the Cornfield
item.description: Laura works through gearbox issues in the cornfield, keeping the day moving with a practical, hands-on farm approach.

media:content.media:title: Gearbox Issues in the Cornfield
media:content.media:description: Laura works through gearbox issues in the cornfield, keeping the day moving with a practical, hands-on farm approach.

item.title: Hot Cornfields and Broken Pivots
item.description: A straightforward day on the farm with hot cornfields and a broken pivot, showing the steady work and problem solving that keep things moving.

media:content.media:title: Hot Cornfields and Broken Pivots
media:content.media:description: A straightforward day on the farm with hot cornfields and a broken pivot, showing the steady work and problem solving that keep things moving.

item.title: Skid-Steer Gets Stuck by the Creek
item.description: A real farm moment as a skid-steer gets stuck by the creek, showing the teamwork and problem-solving that come with daily life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Skid-Steer Gets Stuck by the Creek
media:content.media:description: A real farm moment as a skid-steer gets stuck by the creek, showing the teamwork and problem-solving that come with daily life on the farm.

item.title: Loads to Haul on the Farm
item.description: Busy hauling loads and keeping the work moving. A simple, hardworking day that shows the pace and teamwork of farm life.

media:content.media:title: Loads to Haul on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Busy hauling loads and keeping the work moving. A simple, hardworking day that shows the pace and teamwork of farm life.

item.title: Desert Camping to Escape the Farm
item.description: A break from daily farm life with a desert camping trip, a simple change of pace and a chance to recharge.

media:content.media:title: Desert Camping to Escape the Farm
media:content.media:description: A break from daily farm life with a desert camping trip, a simple change of pace and a chance to recharge.

item.title: Drive Your Tractor to School Day
item.description: A fun farm-life moment with Drive Your Tractor to School Day, celebrating tractors, rural routines, and the everyday spirit of farming.

media:content.media:title: Drive Your Tractor to School Day
media:content.media:description: A fun farm-life moment with Drive Your Tractor to School Day, celebrating tractors, rural routines, and the everyday spirit of farming.

item.title: Road Train Life on the Farm
item.description: A simple farm moment with a road train and a truckie mindset sharing the everyday rhythm of rural work.

media:content.media:title: Road Train Life on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A simple farm moment with a road train and a truckie mindset sharing the everyday rhythm of rural work.

item.title: Future-Proofing Fields with New Rows
item.description: Setting new rows and future-proofing the fields with a practical, forward-looking approach to farm work.

media:content.media:title: Future-Proofing Fields with New Rows
media:content.media:description: Setting new rows and future-proofing the fields with a practical, forward-looking approach to farm work.

item.title: Facing a Tough Field Day
item.description: A tough day in the field as conditions don’t look good. A real look at farm life, patience, and keeping the work moving.

media:content.media:title: Facing a Tough Field Day
media:content.media:description: A tough day in the field as conditions don’t look good. A real look at farm life, patience, and keeping the work moving.

item.title: That's Hot!
item.description: A simple, upbeat farm moment with a warm, energetic feel.

media:content.media:title: That's Hot!
media:content.media:description: A simple, upbeat farm moment with a warm, energetic feel.

item.title: Fixing a Truck for the Road
item.description: A truck undergoes repairs and maintenance to prepare it for reliable road use, including inspections, mechanical fixes, and testing.

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Truck for the Road
media:content.media:description: A truck undergoes repairs and maintenance to prepare it for reliable road use, including inspections, mechanical fixes, and testing.
